_note: Medial e per Loth 1866 (corrected after user feedback): the Kurrent-e is FLAT and WIDE, sitting entirely within x-height — not a tall single-loop shape. The path traces three subtle peaks: (1) the entry stroke from the previous letter rises to a low arch, (2) the e-body itself peaks with the kleine Schleife/Kreuzungsfall inside it, (3) the exit stroke leaves toward the next letter via a third low arch. One continuous stroke; the Schleife is the only true self-crossing. Aspect ratio is roughly 2:1 wide-to-tall, matching the Loth alphabet-chart depiction.
